albums.title: The Bridge
albums.label: RCA Victor
albums.notes: Ultimately a 6/10 not like. Thought he'd love it because of God Bless the Child but the album is uneven. Jim Hall's guitar is consistently the best part.
notable_qualities: Jim Hall guitar is consistently the highlight
too uneven — peaks with In a Sentimental Mood and God Bless the Child but valleys with John S.
didn't hold up as well as Saxophone Colossus

albums.title: Saxophone Colossus
albums.label: Prestige
albums.notes: Great album, will revisit. Max Roach is insane on drums and almost steals the show on several tracks like Moritat and Strode Rode.
notable_qualities: Max Roach almost steals the show

albums.title: Mingus Ah Um
albums.label: Columbia
albums.notes: One of the better albums heard. Such a strong first half with so much energy, passion, and expression. Slowly fades after Bird Calls but overall incredible. Wants it on vinyl.
notable_qualities: strong first half with massive energy
one of the better albums heard
albums.favorite_moments: First half — Better Git It in Your Soul through Open Letter to Duke
